prompt: Create a square black-and-white studio portrait of a young adult man with a slim face and androgynous alternative style. He has dark medium-length wavy hair swept back and falling to the shoulders, a slightly messy natural texture, large round clear eyeglasses, stretched ear gauges, and a small septum ring. He wears an oversized plain black crewneck sweatshirt with almost no visible logo detail. Pose him from the chest up, centered but slightly lower in frame, head tilted downward and gently to one side, eyes looking down with a calm introspective expression and closed relaxed mouth. Use a plain white seamless background with no props. Lighting should be dramatic high-contrast monochrome: strong soft key light from above/front-left creating deep shadows on the face and sweatshirt, crisp dark tones, visible cheekbones and neck tendons, subtle rim separation in the hair, fine film grain, editorial fashion portrait mood. Keep the composition minimal, realistic, sharp, and photographic, with shallow-to-moderate depth of field and no text or watermark.
promptEn: Create a square black-and-white studio portrait of a young adult man with a slim face and androgynous alternative style. He has dark medium-length wavy hair swept back and falling to the shoulders, a slightly messy natural texture, large round clear eyeglasses, stretched ear gauges, and a small septum ring. He wears an oversized plain black crewneck sweatshirt with almost no visible logo detail. Pose him from the chest up, centered but slightly lower in frame, head tilted downward and gently to one side, eyes looking down with a calm introspective expression and closed relaxed mouth. Use a plain white seamless background with no props. Lighting should be dramatic high-contrast monochrome: strong soft key light from above/front-left creating deep shadows on the face and sweatshirt, crisp dark tones, visible cheekbones and neck tendons, subtle rim separation in the hair, fine film grain, editorial fashion portrait mood. Keep the composition minimal, realistic, sharp, and photographic, with shallow-to-moderate depth of field and no text or watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张正方形的黑白影棚肖像，主角是一位面部轮廓纤细、具有中性另类风格的年轻男性。他留着 深色中长波浪卷发，头发向后梳并垂至肩部，呈现出自然的凌乱质感；佩戴大号圆形透明眼镜、扩耳饰以及一个小巧的鼻中隔环。他身穿一件超大号纯黑色圆领卫衣，几乎没有任何可见的品牌标志。构图为胸部以上，居中但位置略微偏下，头部向下倾斜并轻微侧向一边，双眼低垂，表情平静且内敛，嘴唇自然闭合。使用纯白色无缝背景，不含任何道具。灯光采用戏剧性的高对比度单色效果：从上方/左前方投射强而柔和的主光，在面部和卫衣上形成深邃的阴影，呈现出清晰的暗调、明显的颧骨和颈部线条，发丝处带有微妙的轮廓光，带有细腻的胶片颗粒感，营造出时尚杂志肖像的氛围。保持构图简约、写实、锐利且具有摄影感，景深适中，画面中不含任何文字或水印。
